owned_files.notes: 52 toxins currently recorded. Schema: id, name, source (biological/animal/chemical/mineral), category, lethal_dose_mg_kg, onset_time_minutes, symptoms (pipe-delimited), antidote, description. Samples: botulinum toxin (0.000001 LD50), tetrodotoxin, cyanide, ricin, palytoxin, batrachotoxin, saxitoxin.

gaps: Heavy metal toxins (lead, mercury, arsenic, cadmium, chromium)
Biological toxins from bacteria (staphylococcal enterotoxins, Shiga toxins)
Plant alkaloids (strychnine, nicotine, atropine, tropane alkaloids)
summary: 52 of ~500-target toxins covered (10.4%). Major gaps in heavy metals, pesticides, industrial chemicals, fungal & bacterial toxins.
